title: No results with VALUES + non-matching OPTIONAL
key_bug_features: VALUES with non-matching OPTIONAL returns empty result set
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE vehicles (id INT PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(255), image_url VARCHAR(255));
INSERT INTO vehicles (id, name, image_url) VALUES (1, 'Fiat 500', NULL), (2, 'Smart Fortwo', NULL);
CREATE TABLE images (vehicle_id INT, image_url VARCHAR(255), FOREIGN KEY (vehicle_id) REFERENCES vehicles(id));
SELECT v.name, i.image_url FROM vehicles v LEFT JOIN images i ON v.id = i.vehicle_id WHERE v.name IN ('Fiat 500', 'Smart Fortwo');
